# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.

Report them privately through GitHub's
[private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/kuldron/obs-kuldron/security/advisories/new).
This sends the report directly to the maintainers and keeps the details
confidential until a fix is available.

When reporting, please include:

- the plugin version (see the Kuldron dock, or the release you installed)
- your OBS Studio version and operating system
- steps to reproduce, and the impact you observed

We aim to acknowledge a report within 3 business days and will keep you
updated as we work on a fix.

## Supported versions

Security fixes target the latest released version. Please upgrade to the
newest release before reporting, in case the issue is already resolved.

## Scope

This policy covers the `obs-kuldron` OBS plugin in this repository. Issues in
OBS Studio itself, or in the Kuldron platform services, should be reported to
their respective projects.
